free_text: Fission yield measurements of Rb, Sr, Cs and Ba
isotopes far from the center of isotopic yield
Selective integrated target-ion source system, see:
Ionizing surface: Ta for separation of Rb and Cs
Re for Sr and Rb, or Ba and Cs
.Beta activity scans at collector over desired
mass region with 300 mu silicon surface barrier
detector to obtain very low gamma-ray background.
Rb and Cs yields obtained from scans with Ta ionizers,
Sr and Ba yields from both Re and Ta ionizers scans by
subtracting the Rb and Cs contributions after
No information given in first reference.
There might be information in IA-1345, which is,
